description_long: This is a small, twin-propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a classic, vintage design. The body is primarily white with a blue stripe running along the windows, which are rectangular and evenly spaced. The wings are straight and mounted low on the fuselage, each supporting a single engine with a visible propeller. The tail section features a conventional design with a horizontal stabilizer and twin vertical fins. The landing gear is fixed, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The cockpit is located at the front, with a blue-tinted windshield and multiple side windows, suggesting a multi-seat configuration.
description: A small, vintage-style twin-propeller airplane with a white body, blue accents, low-mounted straight wings, and a conventional twin-fin tail. The cockpit is forward with multiple windows, and the landing gear is fixed.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue stripe, cockpit windows, twin propellers, and the twin-fin tail design.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin vertical stabilizers, horizontal stabilizer, and the symmetry of the wings and tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the propellers, blue window stripe, and the fixed landing gear under the wings.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the twin propellers, forward cockpit, and the full wingspan with low-mounted straight wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston engines mounted on the wings, each with a visible propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a horizontal stabilizer and twin vertical stabilizers (twin-fin design).
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels under the wings and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple side windows, suggesting a multi-seat configuration.
